articles.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
articles.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and warned the current CLARITY Act framework could ultimately fail, as banks and crypto firms clash over whether stablecoin issuers should be allowed to offer yield-bearing rewards that resemble bank deposits.

articles.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
articles.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

articles.title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
articles.description: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

articles.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
articles.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs i

articles.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
articles.description: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-aqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.

articles.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
articles.description: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

articles.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
articles.description: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.

articles.title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
articles.description: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.

articles.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
articles.description: As the CFTC issued landmark approvals for crypto perpetual futures contracts, it explained in a related advisory that round-the-clock activity isn't right for all.

articles.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
articles.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

articles.title: 移植器官最危險的一小時，找到阻止「鐵死亡」的新方法
articles.description: 器官移植能拯救許多疾病末期的病患，但真正決定治療成敗的，往往不是手術技術，而是器官能否撐過移植前後那段劇烈的生 […]

articles.title: 天生條件還是成長環境？最新研究揭示，宇宙初期星系大小就已由「出身地」決定
articles.description: 現今宇宙中的星系並非均勻分布，而是聚集成群，甚至形成包含數百至數千個星系的巨大星系團。不過，這些龐大結構並非一 […]

articles.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
articles.description: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

articles.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
articles.description: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.

articles.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
articles.description: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin shrugs off early decline, but two-month winning streak is in jeopardy
articles.description: A hopeful posting on Iran from President Trump helped erase morning losses.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
articles.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

articles.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Apply now to share your insight and help shape the conversations defining the tech industry.
